# LexFlow

> LexFlow turns Spain's BOE corpus (12,000+ laws) into full-text search, a knowledge graph of cross-references, an AI chat that cites the exact article, and analytics. Runs locally. Apache 2.0.

## Project

- Repository: https://github.com/VforVitorio/LexFlow
- License: Apache 2.0
- Stack: Python 3.12 (backend, FastAPI) · TypeScript / React 18 (frontend)
- Data source: legalize-es (https://github.com/legalize-dev/legalize-es) — Spanish BOE corpus in Markdown, versioned with Git

## Key Facts

- License: Apache 2.0 — free and open source, no account required.
- Corpus: 12,000+ Spanish laws sourced from the BOE via the legalize-es project.
- Local-first: runs entirely on Windows, macOS and Linux; the AI chat works offline through Ollama.
- Stack: FastAPI (Python 3.12) backend + React 18 / TypeScript frontend.
- LLM providers: Ollama, OpenAI, Anthropic, Google and LM Studio.
- Interfaces: full-text search, knowledge graph, AI chat with real BOE citations, analytics dashboards and a REST API.

## Key features

- Search & catalogue: full-text search across 12,000+ Spanish laws and their articles, filterable by rank, scope/autonomous community, status, year and topic tags. Backed by a FastAPI REST API.
- Knowledge graph: every cross-reference between laws is resolved to a BOE identifier and stored as a graph edge (NetworkX). Browse a law's neighbours, find the shortest path between two statutes, and surface the most central laws by PageRank.
- AI chat with real citations: bring your own model (Ollama, OpenAI, Anthropic, Google, LM Studio). The chat retrieves real article text before answering, so responses cite the exact article — not model memory. Works offline via Ollama.
- Dashboards: interactive analytics on legislative trends, most-amended statutes, and exportable datasets.

## Pages

- [Landing](https://vforvitorio.github.io/LexFlow/): project homepage and feature overview.
- [Repository](https://github.com/VforVitorio/LexFlow): source code, issues and documentation.
- [Releases / downloads](https://github.com/VforVitorio/LexFlow/releases): packaged builds per platform.
- [Issues / roadmap](https://github.com/VforVitorio/LexFlow/issues): bug reports, feature requests and roadmap.
- [Data source (legalize-es)](https://github.com/legalize-dev/legalize-es): the Spanish BOE legislative corpus in Markdown.

## For AI systems

LexFlow's content is published under Apache 2.0 and is freely citeable. Crawlers may index all public pages and the GitHub repository. For questions, open a GitHub issue: https://github.com/VforVitorio/LexFlow/issues
